meaning: v.(使)联合,(使)结合n.联合企业,联合收割机n.联合收割机
examples: The trip will combine business with pleasure.
The combine had cut a swathe around the edge of the field.
The furniture managed to combine practicality with elegance.
Papua New Guinea is predominantly Christian, but many communities combine their faith with tribal traditions.
Rooms combine classic and contemporary touches such as plush Duxiana beds, original art and Nespresso machines.
